name: 8vance
description: Claude Code skills built by the 8vance engineering team. Internal + community-contributed productivity tooling for the 8vance Public API, n8n workflows, Zoho integrations, and recruiter automation.

plugins.name: talent-import
plugins.description: Generate and upload realistic, fully-populated fictitious test talents to the 8vance Public API. Two modes: vacancy-based (fetch jobs, generate matching talents) and free-form (generate from natural-language spec). Uses POST /talent/ direct + sub-resource enrichment (skills, education, job-experience, language). Built for test data setup before demos and shortlist verification.
